goal: Make the pre-R064 PU-001 through PU-016 review-coverage backfill requirement executable through a ratification ledger, validator, tests, and goal-board evidence so final Judge/PM closeout cannot rely on prose-only historical review claims.

forbiddenFiles: PR template, Linear gate, CircleCI, CodeRabbit, GitHub, release, merge, or external tracker mutation
fabricated pass claims for historical reviewers or skill lenses

designConstraints: The ledger must cover PU-001 through PU-016 because the goal board explicitly requires a historical backfill or ratification ledger before final Judge/PM closeout.

The ledger must distinguish pass evidence from accepted exceptions. Pre-R064 missing review members may be ratified as not applicable only when the reason, owner, and accepted exception receipt are explicit.

The validator must fail closed on missing lifecycle units, duplicate lifecycle units, missing required skill lenses, missing required independent reviewers, unsupported statuses, pass entries without current evidence refs, and non-pass entries without reason plus owner or accepted exception.
The validator must resolve evidence refs that point to repo-relative files and receipt fragments such as docs/goals/codex-runtime-evidence-verifier-cockpit/receipts.jsonl#R064.
The validator must not mutate historical receipts or infer review completion from nearby prose.
The ledger must preserve the truth that PU-001 through PU-016 happened before the R064 full review contract; it must not downscope the current post-R064 per-slice review requirements.
The implementation must remain a narrow Python validator plus TypeScript dev-script tests, avoiding a new public CLI command in this slice.
The repair of shared Git core.worktree drift must be recorded as runtime/environment evidence because it blocked trustworthy worktree status before this slice began.
acceptanceCriteria: review-coverage-backfill.json uses schemaVersion goal-review-coverage-backfill/v1 and records goalSlug, generatedAt, coverageWindow, requiredSkillLenses, requiredIndependentReviewers, acceptedExceptionRefs, and lifecycleUnits.
The ledger has exactly one entry for each PU-001 through PU-016 lifecycle unit.
Each lifecycle unit entry includes sourceReceiptRefs and structured sliceSkillLensResults plus independentReviewerResults maps.
Every required skill lens is present for every lifecycle unit: improve-codebase-architecture, simplify, unslopify, he-code-review, and testing.
Every required independent reviewer is present for every lifecycle unit: adversarial-reviewer, agent-native-reviewer, and best-practices-researcher.
Pass members require role, producer, freshness current, evidenceRef, and resolvable current repo evidence.
Blocked, fail, and not applicable members require reason and either owner or acceptedExceptionRef.
Accepted exception refs must resolve to known receipt fragments in receipts.jsonl, not local-only prose.
Fail members are rejected unless an accepted exception is explicitly provided in the same member result.
The validator outputs stable JSON on success and stable fail text on validation errors.

Tests cover success, missing lifecycle unit, duplicate lifecycle unit, missing required member, unresolved receipt fragment, unresolved evidence file, pass without current freshness, and non-pass without owner or accepted exception.
The goal board/state references the backfill ledger as the required historical closeout evidence without claiming final goal completion.
Receipt R133 records the worktree core.worktree guard repair, validator/test evidence, skill-lens artifacts, independent reviewer artifacts, and open truth lanes.
rollbackPlan: Remove the review-coverage backfill ledger, validator, dev-script tests, and PU-039 review artifacts.
Remove the state.yaml reference to PU-039 as the current historical backfill artifact.
Keep the post-R064 per-slice review contract unchanged; this slice only makes the historical ratification requirement executable.
currentStateNotes: Base head is 9e453d07672784240c4ee481acca7f8e59f4390a on codex/jsc-363-review-coverage-backfill, based on origin/codex/jsc-363-intermediary-receipt-coverage.

Before this intent, the new worktree was poisoned by shared Git common config core.worktree=/private/tmp/coding-harness-linked-issue-scope. The repo-owned guard bash scripts/check-git-common-config.sh failed, bash scripts/check-git-common-config.sh --repair removed the shared core.worktree, and the guard then passed.
PR #315 and PR #316 were green, CLEAN, and mergeable on the last observed heads, but this slice does not claim review approval, merge readiness, Linear completion, or JSC-363 acceptance completion.
The live browser implementation-notes HTML is a local runtime projection; this slice only changes tracked goal evidence.
stopConditions: Stop if implementation requires rewriting historical receipt content instead of adding an append-only ratification artifact.
Stop if a historical reviewer or skill lens would need to be marked pass without a current evidence ref.
Stop if the validator cannot distinguish receipt-fragment evidence from prose-only claims.
Stop if PR, Linear, merge, or external tracker mutation becomes necessary for the local validator slice.
